---
title: "Workshop 01 - Introduction to ARBO-WATCH"
subtitle: "Project Overview and Monitoring Framework"
author: "Jane Doe"
date: 2024-03-01
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    slide-number: true
    footer: "ARBO-WATCH — Workshop 01"
---

## Welcome

- Introduction to the ARBO-WATCH project
- Goals and scope of the 4-year programme
- Meet the team

---

## What is Arboreal Monitoring?

- Systematic observation of tree-dwelling species
- Long-term data collection for biodiversity assessment
- Integration of field methods and digital tools

---

## Project Structure

- 4 years, multiple workshops per year
- Mix of theory, field practice, and data analysis
- Open materials and reproducible workflows

---

## Tools We Will Use

- R and the tidyverse
- Quarto for reproducible reporting
- Field data sheets and GPS devices

---

## Hands-on Exercise

- Install R and RStudio
- Explore the sample dataset
- Produce your first summary table

---

## Summary

- ARBO-WATCH monitors arboreal biodiversity over 4 years
- Workshops combine field skills with data analysis
- All materials are freely available under CC BY 4.0
